uiDefinition.description: Base URL of your DocRouter instance. Leave blank to use the default (https://app.docrouter.ai/fastapi).

Your DocRouter organization ID (used for all actions on this connection). In the DocRouter web app, open the URL in your browser: it looks like https://app.docrouter.ai/orgs/{organization_id}/... — copy the segment after /orgs/ (for example, 679c9a914cfaaaa3640811ed). You can also find it under Settings → Organization.
uiDefinition.tooltip: Copy the ID from the path after /orgs/ in your DocRouter URL (e.g. https://app.docrouter.ai/orgs/679c9a914cfaaaa3640811ed/docs)

uiDefinition.description: Your organization token for API access. Create one under Settings → Developer in the DocRouter app. (Sent as the X-Api-Key header.)
uiDefinition.tooltip: Paste your organization token (treated as a secret in this form)
